findings.title: npm vulnerability: @hono/node-server
findings.description: @hono/node-server: Middleware bypass via repeated slashes in serveStatic. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: brace-expansion
findings.description: brace-expansion: Zero-step sequence causes process hang and memory exhaustion. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: hono
findings.description: Hono missing validation of cookie name on write path in setCookie(). Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.

findings.title: npm vulnerability: path-to-regexp
findings.description: path-to-regexp vulnerable to Denial of Service via sequential optional groups. Run `npm audit fix` to remediate.
